The presence of a white pickup truck modified with a passenger canopy/shell is extremely common in rural Philippines. The specific style of the small, under-powered motorcycles (underbones) parked on the side is a hallmark of Southeast Asian transport, particularly the Philippines. Additionally, the style of the makeshift blue tarp shelter and the specific way the white bunting flags are strung across the road are very common in Filipino barangays during local festivities or elections.
